title: banksia microstachya var. marginata
intro: Banksia microstachya var. marginata, also known as the hairy-leaved banksia, is a variety of the Banksia microstachya plant, which is a flowering plant native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Banksia microstachya var. marginata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and cones can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
